name: Make
description: Monitor Make (formerly Integromat) automation workflows for access and environment separation compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Make at https://make.com
2. Go to Profile → API
3. Generate an API key
4. Find your region in the URL (e.g. eu1.make.com)
5. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Make → Profile → API → API key

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your Make region: eu1 (Europe), us1 (United States), or ap1 (Asia Pacific)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Make organization members and their automation access

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Make teams are configured for access separation across environments
